tests.prompt: Run the focused useEncounterState tests. Verify multi-zone snapshot theme hydration, missing/unknown fallback, incremental Hex.zoneId retention, reconnect replacement, deterministic lookup, no topology inference, and prior-state non-mutation.
Run stream and EncounterView tests. Verify SnapshotDelivered replaces region truth and GeometryRevealed merges full Hex records without changing existing v2 stream/entity behavior.
Run npm run ci-check. Verify formatting, lint, typecheck, build, and the full test suite pass.
After opening the PR, acknowledge, address, and resolve every Copilot review thread individually.
